name: Zerokrim CH Dewormer for Cats & Dogs - 2 Tablets
shortDescription: Zerokrim CH is a broad-spectrum deworming tablet formulated for the effective treatment and control of roundworms, hookworms, tapeworms, and whipworms in both cats and dogs. Each tablet is designed to deliver fast-acting relief and help keep your pets healthy, active, and free from internal parasites. Broad-spectrum deworming solution for both cats and dogs
description: Broad-spectrum deworming solution for both cats and dogs Zerokrim CH is a broad-spectrum deworming tablet formulated for the effective treatment and control of roundworms, hookworms, tapeworms, and whipworms in both cats and dogs. Each tablet is designed to deliver fast-acting relief and help keep your pets healthy, active, and free from internal parasites. Suitable for both cats and dogs , Zerokrim CH makes deworming simple and convenient with a single oral dose and can be used as part of a regular worm control program. Key Benefits: Effective against tapeworms, roundworms, hookworms, and whipworms Suitable for cats and dogs of all breeds Easy oral administration Can be used in pets over 6 weeks of age Helps improve digestive health and overall vitality Dosage & Administration: Administer orally according to your pet’s body weight For dogs and cats: 1 tablet per 10 kg body weight (or as directed by a vet) Deworming should be done every 3 months or as advised by your veterinarian Active Ingredients: Praziquantel – effective against tapeworms Pyrantel Pamoate – targets roundworms and hookworms Febantel – combats whipworms Precautions: Not recommended for use in puppies or kittens under 6 weeks of age Do not exceed the recommended dosage Consult your vet before use in pregnant or lactating animals Storage: Store in a cool, dry place below 25°C Keep out of reach of children and pets Use within the expiry date mentioned on the packaging
